_comment_: Worked example: manifestation + entrepreneur Skool community (Ashley's wife). This is the reference config — real client configs live alongside this but are gitignored.

community.topic: A Skool community where women learn to combine manifestation, mindset, and real business strategy to build a life and income they love.
community.audience: Women 25-45 who believe in the law of attraction but feel stuck — they're doing the vision boards and affirmations but haven't cracked the code on turning that energy into a real business or income stream.
community.promise: In 90 days you'll have a clear business idea, your first paying clients or customers, and a manifestation practice that's actually backed by strategy — not just vibes.
community.founder_story: I spent years believing I could manifest anything I wanted, but I was missing the bridge between the spiritual side and the practical business side. Once I combined both, everything clicked. I built [X] while also deepening my spiritual practice. I want to show other women they don't have to choose between woo and hustle.

offer_ladder: FREE lead magnet: '5-Day Manifest Your Business Challenge' PDF
PAID community: Manifest & Thrive Skool ($47/mo) — courses + community + live calls
HIGH TICKET: 1:1 coaching or group mastermind ($997-$3,000)

existing_assets: Starting fresh — no existing following. Has a personal Instagram (private). No email list yet.

brand.voice: warm, honest, spiritually grounded, practical, empowering — like your most successful spiritual friend who actually gives you real advice
brand.emoji_rule: use intentionally — ✨ 🙏 💛 are on-brand; no clutter

classroom_modules: Module 1: Your Manifestation Foundation (the missing piece)
Module 2: The Business Idea That's Already Inside You
Module 3: Your First Offer — Simple, Sellable, Aligned
Module 4: Showing Up Online Without Burning Out

safety.notes: All content staged to outbox/ — founder publishes manually. No auto-posting.
